tasks.subject: [fix-chat-ui-reliability-bugs] [P1] Remove ?? '' coercions at useTaskState and useSessionStatus call sites in ChatPanel
tasks.description:
Remove the `?? ''` null coercions in `ChatPanel.tsx` that were masking the missing `enabled` guards. After tasks 1.1 and 1.2 update the hook signatures to accept `string | null`, these coercions are not only unnecessary but actively harmful — they prevent the enabled guards from firing by converting null to `''`.

## Files to Modify

- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/ui/ChatPanel.tsx`

## Current Code

Line 37:
```tsx
const taskState = useTaskState(sessionId ?? '');
```

Line 114:
```tsx
const { permissionMode } = useSessionStatus(sessionId ?? '', sessionStatus, status === 'streaming');
```

## Required Changes

Line 37 — pass `sessionId` directly (now accepts `string | null`):
```tsx
const taskState = useTaskState(sessionId);
```

Line 114 — pass `sessionId` directly (now accepts `string | null`):
```tsx
const { permissionMode } = useSessionStatus(sessionId, sessionStatus, status === 'streaming');
```

## Context: ChatPanel's `sessionId` type

`ChatPanel` declares its prop as `sessionId: string | null` (line 28):
```tsx
interface ChatPanelProps {
  sessionId: string | null;
  /** Optional transform applied to message content before sending to server */
  transformContent?: (content: string) => string | Promise<string>;
}
```

So `sessionId` is already `string | null` — the `?? ''` was a workaround for hooks that previously only accepted `string`. After tasks 1.1 and 1.2, the hooks accept `string | null` directly.

## Verification

After this change:
1. TypeScript should compile without errors — the updated hook signatures accept `string | null`
2. Open DevTools Network tab on a page where `sessionId` is null (new session, not yet created). Zero requests to `/api/sessions//task-state` or `/api/sessions//status` should appear.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `ChatPanel.tsx` line 37: `useTaskState(sessionId)` (no `?? ''`)
- [ ] `ChatPanel.tsx` line 114: `useSessionStatus(sessionId, ...)` (no `?? ''`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors
- [ ] No other `?? ''` coercions for sessionId exist in the file (check for regressions)

tasks.subject: [fix-chat-ui-reliability-bugs] [P3] Thread pendingUserContent through ChatPanel to MessageList
tasks.description:
Destructure `pendingUserContent` from `useChatSession` in `ChatPanel.tsx`, update the empty-state guard to account for the pending bubble, and pass `pendingUserContent` as a prop to `MessageList`. ## Files to Modify - `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/ui/ChatPanel.tsx` ## Step 1: Destructure pendingUserContent from useChatSession In the `useChatSession` call (lines 85-113), add `pendingUserContent` to the destructured return: ```tsx const { messages, pendingUserContent, // ← ADD input, setInput, handleSubmit, submitContent, status, error, sessionBusy, stop, isLoadingHistory, sessionStatus, streamStartTime, estimatedTokens, isTextStreaming, isWaitingForUser, waitingType, activeInteraction, markToolCallResponded, } = useChatSession(sessionId, { transformContent: fileTransformContent, onTaskEvent: handleTaskEventWithCelebrations, onSessionIdChange: setSessionId, onStreamingDone: useCallback(() => { if (enableNotificationSound) { playNotificationSound(); } }, [enableNotificationSound]), }); ``` ## Step 2: Update the empty-state guard The current empty-state check at line 248: ```tsx ) : messages.length === 0 ? (

Start a conversation

Type a message below to begin

) : (

Start a conversation

Type a message below to begin

) : ( ` JSX (lines 256-272), add the new prop: ```tsx ``` ## Step 4: Update the scroll-to-bottom button visibility guard Line 293: ```tsx {!isAtBottom && messages.length > 0 && !isLoadingHistory && ( ``` Update to also show the button when pendingUserContent is present (the pending bubble counts as content): ```tsx {!isAtBottom && (messages.length > 0 || !!pendingUserContent) && !isLoadingHistory && ( ``` ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] `pendingUserContent` is destructured from `useChatSession` - [ ] The empty-state guard is `messages.length === 0 && !pendingUserContent` - [ ] `pendingUserContent={pendingUserContent}` is passed to `` - [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (requires task 3.3 to update `MessageListProps`) - [ ] The scroll button guard accounts for `pendingUserContent`

tasks.subject: [fix-chat-ui-reliability-bugs] [P4] Run full test suite and verify zero regressions across all three bug fixes
tasks.description:
Run the complete client test suite to confirm all three bug fixes are correct and no regressions exist in the broader chat feature.

## Commands

```bash
# Run all client tests
pnpm vitest run apps/client/src

# Or run specific affected test files individually:
pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/model/__tests__/use-task-state.test.ts
pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/entities/session/model/__tests__/use-session-status-guard.test.ts
pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/model/__tests__/stream-event-handler
pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/ui/message/__tests__/AssistantMessageContent.test.tsx
pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/__tests__/use-chat-session.test.tsx
pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/__tests__/MessageList.test.tsx
pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/__tests__/ChatPanel.test.tsx
```

## TypeScript Check

```bash
pnpm typecheck
```

## What to Verify

### Bug 1 (Stable React Keys)
- [ ] Zero `console.error` calls containing "same key" in `AssistantMessageContent.test.tsx`
- [ ] `_partId` assigned correctly on `text_delta` in `stream-event-handler` tests
- [ ] TypeScript compiles: `_partId` type cast or type extension is clean

### Bug 2 (Session ID Guard)
- [ ] `useTaskState(null)` → `transport.getTasks` not called
- [ ] `useSessionStatus(null, ...)` → `transport.getSession` not called
- [ ] `ChatPanel.tsx` compiles: `useTaskState(sessionId)` and `useSessionStatus(sessionId, ...)` type-check correctly with `string | null`

### Bug 3 (Pending User Content)
- [ ] No optimistic user message in `messages` array after `handleSubmit`
- [ ] `pendingUserContent` is set immediately on submit
- [ ] `pendingUserContent` is cleared when streaming begins or completes
- [ ] `pendingUserContent` is cleared on error
- [ ] `MessageList` renders pending bubble when `pendingUserContent` is non-null
- [ ] Empty-state guard in `ChatPanel` shows `MessageList` (not empty state) when `pendingUserContent` is set

### No Regressions
- [ ] `ChatPanel.test.tsx` still passes (mocks updated for new hook signatures if needed)
- [ ] All other chat feature tests pass
- [ ] No new TypeScript errors introduced

## ChatPanel.test.tsx Mock Update

The `ChatPanel.test.tsx` mocks `useChatSession` (line 14). After adding `pendingUserContent` to the return value, update the mock:

```ts
vi.mock('../model/use-chat-session', () => ({
  useChatSession: () => ({
    messages: [],
    pendingUserContent: null,  // ← ADD
    input: '',
    setInput: vi.fn(),
    handleSubmit: vi.fn(),
    status: 'idle',
    error: null,
    stop: vi.fn(),
    isLoadingHistory: false,
    sessionStatus: null,
    streamStartTime: null,
    estimatedTokens: null,
    isTextStreaming: false,
    // ... other fields
  }),
}));
```

The `useTaskState` mock (line 37) must accept `null` as its argument:
```ts
vi.mock('../model/use-task-state', () => ({
  useTaskState: (_sessionId: string | null) => ({  // ← updated type
    tasks: [],
    activeForm: null,
    isCollapsed: true,
    toggleCollapse: vi.fn(),
    handleTaskEvent: vi.fn(),
  }),
}));
```

The `useSessionStatus` mock (line 65) must accept `null`:
```ts
vi.mock('@/layers/entities/session/model/use-session-status', () => ({
  useSessionStatus: (_sessionId: string | null, ...) => ({  // ← updated type
    permissionMode: 'default',
    // ...
  }),
}));
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src` exits with 0 failures
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` exits with 0 errors
- [ ] All new test files added in phases 1-3 pass
- [ ] All existing test files in `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/` pass
- [ ] All existing test files in `apps/client/src/layers/entities/session/` pass
- [ ] `ChatPanel.test.tsx` mock updated to include `pendingUserContent: null`
